summary: Sampled 100 emails from 243 total sent (5 search batches across Jan 2024 - Feb 2026). After filtering: 100 substantive emails with avg 467 chars.
broadcast: Gmail sent emails: 100 substantive entries from 243 searched. Email voice tends to be more conversational and direct than LinkedIn — useful for diversity. Anonymization applied (87 unique names + PII stripped). Date range: Nov 2024 - Feb 2026.
learnings: Gmail payload field contains full text when withTextPayload=true - no need for separate get-email call
OOO auto-replies dominated Jul-Sep 2025 period (had to filter with explicit query exclusion)
Signature stripping with regex patterns works well for Superhuman-formatted emails
73% of substantive emails are replies - V writes more in reply context than cold outreach
Two-pass anonymization needed: first from recipient fields, then manual additions for names mentioned in body only
